programme.desc: S1 E564 Karishma fails to murder Chandrika, hinting at an informant before fleeing. However, Vasudha blames Samar, whose shocking demand forces Avinash to act.
programme.title: Vasudha

programme.desc: S1 E241 Madhu spots the aim to harm her father and Pujari exposes Durgawati's role in the breakup.
programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan

programme.desc: S1 E375 Saru endures severe criticism while concealing the truth about Chandrakant's demise. Later, Ved confronts her with a demand to probe Rajat's father's case.
programme.title: Saru

programme.desc: S1 E571 As Karishma gets admitted to a psychiatric facility, Chandrika arrives at the Chauhan house. Later, Mayur earns high praise when Devansh discloses his contribution to rebuilding their wealth.
programme.title: Vasudha

programme.desc: S1 E320 Faced with the upcoming wedding and Gopal's financial struggle, Anu defies traditional expectations, putting Garima first and personally fighting for a bank loan.
programme.title: Tum Se Tum Tak

programme.desc: S1 E195 After Jagaddhatri steps in to protect Tapasya during a heated clash, Tapasya lashes out at her over her lost belongings. Meanwhile, Shivaay begins to fear there is a mole within his team.
programme.title: Jagadhatri

programme.desc: S1 E132 Lakshmi's secret job is exposed by Revati, forcing a tense confrontation. Meanwhile, Raj knocks out Bhoomika's friend and Veer is left stunned upon spotting Champa's mother at a flower stall.
programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas

programme.desc: S1 E571 As Karishma gets admitted to a psychiatric facility, Chandrika arrives at the Chauhan house. Later, Mayur earns high praise when Devansh discloses his contribution to rebuilding their wealth.

programme.desc: S1 E524 Raghav agrees to Aniket's conditions for their collaboration and finalises the deal. Later, he refuses to join his family at the temple, choosing instead to go to the office.

programme.desc: S1 E375 Saru endures severe criticism while concealing the truth about Chandrakant's demise. Later, Ved confronts her with a demand to probe Rajat's father's case.
